response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive leadership experience, fintech-specific expertise, or a proven track record in scaling engineering teams to the required size. His background in agentic frameworks and real-time systems is promising but not clearly aligned with the regulated, high-stakes fintech environment specified in the role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators, agentic workflows at re:cinq).
Deep expertise in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time data processing (e.g., low-latency apps at Sociomantic, GISCollective).
Strong technical breadth across full-stack development, tooling, and open-source contributions (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience or track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Limited fintech-specific experience (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, regulatory compliance).
Agentic AI experience appears more prototypical (e.g., GISCollective) rather than production-scale in regulated environments.
